justification: The diff performs a Spring Boot 2.7 -> 3.3 and Java 17 -> 21 migration, correctly updating javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence and hibernate-core to org.hibernate.orm. However, it aggressively deletes entire test files (e.g., OdontologoRepositoryTest, PacienteServiceTest) and removes dependencies like spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf without justification, causing significant spurious churn and loss of functionality. No Java 21 idioms (like records or pattern matching) are introduced.
